author: ftorrresd
body:
#### PR description:

Modify the Mini2Mini workflow in order to recompute Muon_softMvaRun3 and Muon_triggerIdLoose.

#### PR validation:

Tested against the current Mini2Mini setup.


#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. 

This is a backport of https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/51030
title: [Mini2Mini] Soft muon mva run3
